channel.title: Android on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in Android on Memo

item.title: Android x86
item.description: Android x86 # System Setup # Host: Linux KVM Guest: Android x86, Lineage OS Install # Download OS image (*.iso) # Download *.iso from https://www.android-x86.org/ Configuration of Virtual Machine Manager # Install #

item.title: Reverse Engineering (APK)
item.description: Reverse Engineering (APK) # This is a page about tools for analyzing APK files, which are application packages for Android, and how to use them. Tools # Apktool # A tool for reverse engineering APKs. Arch paru -S android-apktool paru -S android-apktool-git dex2jar # A tool to convert Android’s dex format to Java’s class. Arch paru -S dex2jar paru -S dex2jar-git jd-cli # CLI tool for Java Decompiler.
